author: Kuestenlogik
name: Bowire Protocol Plugin
description: A scaffold for a Bowire protocol plugin that implements IBowireProtocol and ships as a NuGet package of type BowirePlugin.

DisplayName.description: Human-readable name shown on the Bowire protocol tab (e.g. "gRPC", "MQTT").

ProtocolId.description: Short identifier used by Bowire internally. Lowercased and stripped to [a-z0-9_-] automatically, so "My Proto!" becomes "myproto".

PluginClassName.description: C# class name that implements IBowireProtocol.

IconSvg.defaultValue: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="16" height="16"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/></svg>
IconSvg.description: Raw SVG markup embedded in the generated IconSvg property and shown on the Bowire protocol tab. Pass your own <svg>...</svg> string to skip the default circle demo.

Author.description: NuGet package Authors field. NuGet emits a warning on an empty value, so we default to a placeholder you should overwrite.

choices.description: REST / OpenAPI — HttpClient fetch with an OpenAPI discovery stub.
gRPC — Grpc.Net.Client GrpcChannel skeleton (add Server Reflection or a generated client for real invokes).

Preset.description: Seed DiscoverAsync / InvokeAsync with a realistic starting point for a specific transport. "none" keeps the generic Echo demo.

BowireSdkVersion.description: Version range of the Kuestenlogik.Bowire NuGet package (the Bowire SDK) this plugin references — also the host-Bowire floor your plugin will demand.

IncludeCI.description: Include a GitHub Actions workflow that builds, tests and packs the plugin.

IncludeDuplexChannel.description: Scaffold a full IBowireChannel echo demo for bidirectional / duplex protocols (WebSocket, SignalR, MQTT, ...).

IncludeIntegrationTests.description: Scaffold a second test project that hosts the plugin inside an ASP.NET Core TestServer (AddBowire + MapBowire) and hits /bowire/api/protocols over HTTP.

ProjectOnly.description: Emit only src/ and tests/ — skip .slnx, Directory.Build.props, Directory.Packages.props, .gitignore, README and .github. Use when adding the plugin to an existing monorepo that already provides these.

Minimal.description: Shortcut for --ProjectOnly true --IncludeCI false --IncludeIntegrationTests false. Produces the smallest possible plugin: two csprojs (plugin + unit tests), no solution, no build-props, no CI, no integration tests.

skipRestore.description: If specified, skips the automatic restore of the project on create.

postActions.description: Restore NuGet packages required by this project.
